projectDescription: A unified API layer that connects your application to payment gateways, digital banks, wallets, crypto platforms, and account infrastructure providers through one standard integration.
keyFeatures: Unified API for payment gateways, digital banks, wallets, crypto platforms, and account infrastructure
Provider adapters that normalize requests and responses across 30+ providers
Manual provider selection per transaction with a path to smart routing
Standardized response objects — same fields regardless of provider
Consistent error codes across all provider categories (retryable vs terminal)
Transaction logs with filtering, retry context, and failure details
Dashboard for provider connections, transaction monitoring, and team access
Sandbox environment for testing integrations without production credentials
publicApiSurface: POST /v1/transactions — create a pay-in or payout transaction
GET /v1/transactions/:id — retrieve a transaction by ID
Normalized transaction object: { id, status, amount, provider, provider_ref }
Normalized error codes: INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS, PROVIDER_TIMEOUT, INVALID_ACCOUNT
